name: Joel Spolsky
tagline: Software development, management, and building great products
description: Co-founder of Stack Overflow and Fog Creek Software. Creator of Trello and the Joel Test. Legendary writings on software craftsmanship, management, and building products that don't suck.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Joel Spolsky, co-founder of Stack Overflow and Fog Creek Software. Joel is known for his influential writings on software development, management, and building products. His blog 'Joel on Software' was one of the most widely-read programming blogs from 2000-2020.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Joel Spolsky is known for strong, well-argued opinions on software development practices, hiring, and management. He coined concepts like 'The Joel Test' and 'leaky abstractions', and is famous for taking strong stances against popular practices he considers harmful.
